name: Death by Chocolate Ala Mr. Food
recipeIngredient: 3 × 3.5 oz instant chocolate pudding mixes (3 packages)
Candy bars, such as Heath or Skor (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven according to the brownie package directions. Bake and cool the brownies. When cooled, prick holes in the tops with a fork and pour coffee liqueur into them. Let stand.
2. Prepare chocolate pudding per package instructions. If desired, use low-calorie pudding mix (flavor remains unchanged). Break candy bars into small pieces using a food processor or hammer.
3. Place half of the brownies in the bottom of a large trifle dish or bowl. Top with half the pudding, half the candy pieces, and half the whipped topping. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
Typists note: To reduce calories, use low-calorie whipped topping, brownie mix, pudding, and omit candy.
